summary: Iteration 12 - Membership System Overhaul Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: 100% - All new membership features verified including prefix dropdown, structured addresses, photo upload, hold/approve/reject/change-type actions, email modal, and ID generation (ACD/ENT/COP format).
seed_data_creation: Multiple test members created during testing: Test Apply, Test SameAddr, Test HoldMember, Test ApproveMember, Test EntMember, Test ChangeType, Test EmailMember, Test RejectMember, Test Professor Submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: Membership system overhaul is complete. New features: (1) Prefix dropdown with Dr./Mr./Mrs./Ms./Prof./Shri/Smt. (2) Structured address fields (Line 1/2/3, State, District, Pincode) for permanent and contact addresses (3) 'Same as permanent' checkbox hides contact address section (4) Photo upload via /api/public/upload-photo (no auth required) (5) Admin actions: approve generates ACD/ENT/COP ID format, hold sets status=hold, change-type regenerates ID, send-email logs email (6) ID format: TYPE/IDSEA/YEAR/SERIAL (e.g., ACD/IDSEA/2026/0001)

public_apply_page.prefix_dropdown: PASSED - Has Dr., Mr., Mrs., Ms., Prof., Shri, Smt. options
public_apply_page.structured_address_fields: PASSED - Line 1, Line 2, Line 3, State dropdown, District, Pincode
public_apply_page.same_as_permanent_checkbox: PASSED - Hides Contact Address section when checked
public_apply_page.photo_upload_area: PASSED - Click to upload, accepts JPG/PNG/WebP up to 5MB
public_apply_page.membership_type_cards: PASSED - Show ID format (ACD/IDSEA/2026/XXXX, ENT/..., COP/...)
public_apply_page.form_submission: PASSED - Creates member with all new fields, redirects to payment step
public_apply_page.payment_step_after_submit: PASSED - Shows UPI QR code, Bank Transfer tabs

backend_apis.POST /api/public/members/apply: PASSED - Accepts prefix, permanent_address, contact_address, contact_same_as_permanent
backend_apis.POST /api/public/upload-photo: PASSED - No auth required, accepts images only, max 5MB
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/members/{id}/change-type: PASSED - Regenerates ID for new type

admin_members_page.prefix_displayed_with_name: PASSED - Shows 'Dr. A. Elango Ph.D', 'Mr. Test SameAddr'
admin_members_page.hold_button_for_pending: PASSED - Pause icon visible for pending members
admin_members_page.approve_button: PASSED - Checkmark icon, generates membership ID
admin_members_page.reject_button: PASSED - X icon, sets status to rejected
admin_members_page.email_button: PASSED - Opens modal with To, Subject, Body, Send Email button
admin_members_page.change_type_button: PASSED - Only for approved members, shows current ID, dropdown for new type
admin_members_page.view_detail_modal: PASSED - Shows member info, status, membership ID
admin_members_page.add_edit_modal: PASSED - Has prefix dropdown, structured address fields, photo upload, same-address checkbox
